delta.text: I
'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm we're on the home
screen.

content.text: I'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm we're on the home screen.
请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

'm on the home screen. I'll open Settings
to navigate to Display > Brightness.

delta.text: I
can see the Display & Brightness page with a brightness slider ("
屏幕亮度"). The slider is currently at about 50%. I also
notice "自动调整亮度" (auto brightness) is enabled. Let me first disable
auto brightness, then drag the brightness slider to the maximum (right

most position).

First, let me turn off auto brightness.

content.text:
I can see the Display & Brightness page with a brightness slider ("屏幕亮度"). The slider is currently at about 50%. I also notice "自动调整亮度" (auto brightness) is enabled. Let me first disable auto brightness, then drag the brightness slider to the maximum (rightmost position).

First, let me turn off auto brightness.

delta.text: Now
I need to drag the brightness slider to the far right. Let me get the XML to
find the exact coordinates of the slider.

content.text: Now I need to drag the brightness slider to the far right. Let me get the XML to find the exact coordinates of the slider.
